ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tweets" (
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each tweet */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time the tweet was posted */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the tweet */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who posted the tweet */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language in which the tweet is written */,
  "gpe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geopolitical entity mentioned in the tweet */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location from which the tweet was posted */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates (latitude, longitude) of the tweet's location */,
  "is_retweet" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the tweet is a retweet */,
  "retweet_of_tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the original tweet if this tweet is a retweet */,
  "reply_to_tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet this tweet is replying to */,
  "quote_of_tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet this tweet is quoting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_retweet_of_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("retweet_of_tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_reply_to_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("reply_to_tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_quote_of_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("quote_of_tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweets_gpe_id FOREIGN KEY ("gpe_id") REFERENCES geopolitical_entities ("gpe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "user_handle" TEXT /* Handle or username of the user */,
  "user_description" TEXT /* Description or bio of the user */,
  "user_location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "user_url" TEXT /* URL associated with the user */,
  "user_follower_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the user has */,
  "user_following_count" INTEGER /* Number of users the user is following */,
  "user_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is verified */,
  "user_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Code of the language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "language_native_name" TEXT /* Name of the language in its native form */,
  "language_family" TEXT /* Family to which the language belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geopolitical_entities" (
  "gpe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geopolitical entity */,
  "gpe_name" TEXT /* Name of the geopolitical entity */,
  "gpe_description" TEXT /* Description of the geopolitical entity */,
  "gpe_population" INTEGER /* Population of the geopolitical entity */,
  "gpe_area" REAL /* Area of the geopolitical entity in square kilometers */,
  "gpe_capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the geopolitical entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gpe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "topic_description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "topic_parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent topic if this topic is a subtopic */,
  "topic_level" INTEGER /* Level of the topic in the hierarchy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_topics" (
  "tweet_topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet-topic association */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the topic */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Score indicating the relevance of the topic to the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_topics_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_topics_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis result */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Sentiment label (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "sentiment_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the sentiment analysis */,
  "sentiment_analysis_tool" TEXT /* Name of the tool used for sentiment analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiments_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engagements" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement metric */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "retweet_count" INTEGER /* Number of retweets */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes */,
  "reply_count" INTEGER /* Number of replies */,
  "quote_count" INTEGER /* Number of quotes */,
  "engagement_score" INTEGER /* Overall engagement score calculated from retweets, likes, replies, and quotes */,
  "engagement_type" TEXT /* Type of engagement (e.g., viral, organic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engagements_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., app, website, API) */,
  "source_version" TEXT /* Version of the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_sources" (
  "tweet_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet-source association */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source */,
  "source_usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the source has been used to post tweets */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_sources_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hashtags" (
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hashtag */,
  "hashtag_text" TEXT /* Text of the hashtag */,
  "hashtag_usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the hashtag has been used */,
  "hashtag_popularity_score" REAL /* Popularity score of the hashtag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hashtag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tweet_hashtags" (
  "tweet_hashtag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tweet-hashtag association */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet */,
  "hashtag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hashtag */,
  "relevance_score" REAL /* Score indicating the relevance of the hashtag to the tweet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tweet_hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_hashtags_hashtag_id FOREIGN KEY ("hashtag_id") REFERENCES hashtags ("hashtag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tweet_hashtags_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "tweet_id" TEXT /* ID of the tweet being accessed */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user accessing the tweet */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the tweet was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_tweet_id FOREIGN KEY ("tweet_id") REFERENCES tweets ("tweet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
